case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BENEFICIAL VS. GRACE L VALENCIA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BENEFICIAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALENCIA, GRACE L $5,664.32 PRINCIPAL, $1,755.16 INTEREST, $247.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,666.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BENEFICIAL AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA, GRACE L DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-02-2009
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $247.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA, GRACE L
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BENEFICIAL SERVED DEC-24-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA, GRACE L
DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST & WAIVER OF ATTY. FEES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BENEFICIAL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BENEFICIAL
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SNYDER, DAVID B. SUBSTITUTED FOR BRACHFELD, ERICA L AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BENEFICIAL
